# jsts-bootstrapped

> Claude primer. Scan top-to-bottom; follow links for detail.

## Stack
| Thing | Value |
|---|---|
| Language | typescript |
| Framework | next |
| Package manager | pnpm |
| Monorepo | false |

## How to work here
| Task | Command / convention |
|---|---|
| Install | `pnpm install` |
| Run | `pnpm dev` |
| Test | `pnpm test` |
| Lint | `pnpm lint` |
| Branching | GitHub Flow. Feature branches from main; PR to merge; main is deployable. |
| Commits | Conventional Commits — e.g. `feat(api): add /healthz endpoint` |

| What | Where |
|---|---|
| **Architecture** | [./docs/architecture.md](./docs/architecture.md) |

| **Memory** | [./memory](./memory) |

## Memory
Session notes and persistent scratch live in [`memory/`](./memory/README.md). TODOs Claude should remember, open questions, mid-session decisions.

## Conventions
| Area | Rule |
|---|---|
| Commit format | Conventional Commits |
| Commit scopes | ui, api, infra, docs |
| Branching | GitHub Flow. Feature branches from main; PR to merge; main is deployable. |
| Hooks | block-main, conventional-commits, eslint, gitleaks, prettier |
